overview: The dependency graph is straightforward: `todo-api` has no dependencies and forms the foundation, while `todo-web` explicitly depends on `todo-api` being available to make REST calls. A bottom-up strategy is applied, building the backend service first to establish a stable API contract, then layering the frontend on top in Phase 2. This ensures the frontend can be developed and tested against a real running API rather than mocks.

phases.name: Foundation Services
phases.description: The backend API service has no dependencies and must be built first. It owns all data persistence, authentication, and business logic that the frontend will rely on.

components.name: todo-api
responsibilities: Manage user registration, login, logout, and password reset with JWT-based authentication and bcrypt password hashing.
Provide full CRUD operations for tasks scoped strictly to the authenticated user, including filtering, sorting, and keyword search.
Provide full CRUD operations for categories, nullifying associated task category references on deletion via ON DELETE SET NULL.
Persist all application data in a SQLite database with WAL mode, parameterized queries, and startup schema migrations.
Expose a /health endpoint that verifies database connectivity and return structured JSON error responses for all failure cases.
components.architectureContext: This is the sole backend service in the system. It is called exclusively by `todo-web` over HTTP REST. It has no upstream service dependencies — it directly owns the SQLite database at `/data/todo.db`. All business logic and data scoping enforcement lives here; the frontend is entirely untrusted.
keyConsiderations: JWT secret must be injected via the `JWT_SECRET` environment variable at startup — fail fast if absent to prevent insecure operation.
The in-memory token blocklist for logout must be pruned on a background goroutine (every hour) to prevent unbounded memory growth; use a mutex for safe concurrent access.

Sort column values from query params must be mapped through a strict allowlist before interpolation into SQL ORDER BY clauses — this is the one place parameterized queries cannot be used for column names.
SQLite's ON DELETE SET NULL for category deletion requires foreign key enforcement to be explicitly enabled per connection: `PRAGMA foreign_keys = ON;`.
The `is_overdue` field is computed at query time (`due_date < CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AND status = 'active'`) and must never be stored or trusted from client input.
components.apiContract:
openapi: 3.0.3
info:
  title: Todo API
  version: 1.0.0
  description: Backend REST API for the Todo management application
servers:
  - url: http://localhost:9090
paths:
  /health:
    get:
      summary: Health check
      operationId: healthCheck
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Service is healthy
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  status:
                    type: string
                    example: ok

  /api/auth/register:
    post:
      summary: Register a new user
      operationId: registerUser
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              required: [email, password]
              properties:
                email:
                  type: string
                  format: email
                password:
                  type: string
                  minLength: 8
      responses:
        '201':
          description: User registered successfully
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/AuthResponse'
        '400':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/BadRequest'
        '409':
          description: Email already in use

  /api/auth/login:
    post:
      summary: Login with email and password
      operationId: loginUser
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              required: [email, password]
              properties:
                email:
                  type: string
                  format: email
                password:
                  type: string
                remember:
                  type: boolean
                  default: false
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Login successful
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/AuthResponse'
        '401':
          description: Invalid credentials

  /api/auth/logout:
    post:
      summary: Logout current user
      operationId: logoutUser
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      responses:
        '204':
          description: Logged out successfully

  /api/auth/password-reset/request:
    post:
      summary: Request a password reset email
      operationId: requestPasswordReset
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              required: [email]
              properties:
                email:
                  type: string
                  format: email
      responses:
        '202':
          description: Reset email sent if account exists

  /api/auth/password-reset/confirm:
    post:
      summary: Confirm password reset with token
      operationId: confirmPasswordReset
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              required: [token, password]
              properties:
                token:
                  type: string
                password:
                  type: string
                  minLength: 8
      responses:
        '204':
          description: Password reset successful
        '400':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/BadRequest'

  /api/tasks:
    get:
      summary: List all tasks for the authenticated user
      operationId: listTasks
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - name: status
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
            enum: [all, active, completed]
            default: all
        - name: category_id
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
        - name: sort_by
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
            enum: [created_at, due_date, title]
            default: created_at
        - name: sort_dir
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
            enum: [asc, desc]
            default: desc
        - name: search
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
      responses:
        '200':
          description: List of tasks
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: '#/components/schemas/Task'
        '401':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/Unauthorized'
    post:
      summary: Create a new task
      operationId: createTask
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/TaskInput'
      responses:
        '201':
          description: Task created
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/Task'
        '400':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/BadRequest'
        '401':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/Unauthorized'

  /api/tasks/{taskId}:
    get:
      summary: Get a single task by ID
      operationId: getTask
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/taskId'
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Task details
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/Task'
        '401':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/Unauthorized'
        '404':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/NotFound'
    put:
      summary: Update a task
      operationId: updateTask
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/taskId'
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/TaskInput'
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Task updated
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/Task'
        '400':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/BadRequest'
        '401':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/Unauthorized'
        '404':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/NotFound'
    delete:
      summary: Delete a task
      operationId: deleteTask
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/taskId'
      responses:
        '204':
          description: Task deleted
        '401':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/Unauthorized'
        '404':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/NotFound'

  /api/tasks/{taskId}/complete:
    patch:
      summary: Toggle task completion status
      operationId: toggleTaskComplete
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/taskId'
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              required: [completed]
              properties:
                completed:
                  type: boolean
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Task completion status updated
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/Task'
        '401':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/Unauthorized'
        '404':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/NotFound'

  /api/categories:
    get:
      summary: List all categories for the authenticated user
      operationId: listCategories
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      responses:
        '200':
          description: List of categories
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: '#/components/schemas/Category'
        '401':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/Unauthorized'
    post:
      summary: Create a new category
      operationId: createCategory
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/CategoryInput'
      responses:
        '201':
          description: Category created
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/Category'
        '400':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/BadRequest'
        '401':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/Unauthorized'

  /api/categories/{categoryId}:
    put:
      summary: Rename a category
      operationId: updateCategory
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/categoryId'
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/CategoryInput'
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Category updated
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/Category'
        '400':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/BadRequest'
        '401':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/Unauthorized'
        '404':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/NotFound'
    delete:
      summary: Delete a category (tasks become uncategorized)
      operationId: deleteCategory
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/categoryId'
      responses:
        '204':
          description: Category deleted
        '401':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/Unauthorized'
        '404':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/NotFound'

components:
  securitySchemes:
    bearerAuth:
      type: http
      scheme: bearer
      bearerFormat: JWT

  parameters:
    taskId:
      name: taskId
      in: path
      required: true
      schema:
        type: string
    categoryId:
      name: categoryId
      in: path
      required: true
      schema:
        type: string

  responses:
    BadRequest:
      description: Invalid request payload
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/Error'
    Unauthorized:
      description: Missing or invalid authentication token
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/Error'
    NotFound:
      description: Resource not found
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/Error'

  schemas:
    AuthResponse:
      type: object
      properties:
        token:
          type: string
        expires_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        user:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/User'

    User:
      type: object
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
        email:
          type: string
          format: email
        created_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time

    Task:
      type: object
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
        user_id:
          type: string
        title:
          type: string
        description:
          type: string
          nullable: true
        status:
          type: string
          enum: [active, completed]
        category_id:
          type: string
          nullable: true
        category_name:
          type: string
          nullable: true
        due_date:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          nullable: true
        is_overdue:
          type: boolean
        created_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        updated_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time

    TaskInput:
      type: object
      required: [title]
      properties:
        title:
          type: string
          minLength: 1
        description:
          type: string
          nullable: true
        category_id:
          type: string
          nullable: true
        due_date:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          nullable: true
        status:
          type: string
          enum: [active, completed]
          default: active

    Category:
      type: object
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
        user_id:
          type: string
        name:
          type: string
        task_count:
          type: integer
        created_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time

    CategoryInput:
      type: object
      required: [name]
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
          minLength: 1

    Error:
      type: object
      properties:
        error:
          type: string
        message:
          type: string

phases.name: Frontend Application
phases.description: The React SPA depends on `todo-api` being fully operational, as it has no data layer of its own. It is built and served statically by Nginx and consumes the backend API contract established in Phase 1.

components.name: todo-web
responsibilities: Provide authenticated user flows for registration, login, logout, and password reset, persisting JWT tokens in localStorage via AuthContext.
Render the primary task management UI with filtering by status and category, sorting, keyword search, and URL-persisted query parameters.
Execute optimistic CRUD operations for tasks and categories against the `todo-api` REST endpoints, reverting local state on API errors.
Visually distinguish task states — overdue (red), due today (orange), completed (muted + strikethrough) — and surface confirmation dialogs before destructive actions.
Serve as a fully responsive static SPA via Nginx, including a /health endpoint and SPA fallback routing via try_files.
components.architectureContext: This component is the sole client of `todo-api`. It has no server-side logic of its own — all data access flows through REST calls to the backend using a bearer token. Nginx serves the compiled static assets and handles SPA client-side routing. The `VITE_API_URL` build arg must point to the running `todo-api` instance.
keyConsiderations: The Axios interceptor must handle 401 responses globally by clearing auth state and redirecting to `/login` — this prevents any protected page from silently failing when a token expires mid-session.
Optimistic updates must track a pre-mutation snapshot of state so that failed API calls can be rolled back accurately, particularly for toggle-complete and delete operations.
Filter and sort state stored in URL query params must be read and written via React Router's `useSearchParams` hook — direct `window.location` manipulation will break the SPA routing lifecycle.

The `VITE_API_URL` environment variable is baked into the static bundle at Docker build time via `ARG`; it cannot be changed at runtime without rebuilding the image, so deployment configuration must pass the correct build arg.

JWT expiry must be checked client-side on app load by decoding the `exp` claim from the token payload (no library needed — base64 decode the second segment) to avoid making authenticated API calls with a stale token.
components.apiContract:
openapi: 3.0.3
info:
  title: Todo Web App
  version: 1.0.0
  description: Static SPA frontend — no backend API of its own. Served by Nginx on port 80.
servers:
  - url: http://localhost:80
paths:
  /health:
    get:
      summary: Health check (served by Nginx)
      operationId: healthCheck
      responses:
        '200':
          description: App is healthy
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  status:
                    type: string
                    example: ok
  /:
    get:
      summary: Serve the React SPA
      operationId: serveApp
      responses:
        '200':
          description: HTML shell for the React application
          content:
            text/html:
              schema:
                type: string
